fees.title: Transparent Fees

fees.footnote: Trading involves risk. Fees may vary by network conditions.

faq.title: Questions, answered
faq.subtitle: Clear operational details—designed for trust, transparency, and control.

q1.a: You retain control of your funds inside the Telegram mini app wallet. Trading involves risk, and losses are possible. PALLADIUM AI focuses on risk-calibrated execution and multi-layer signal validation.

q2.a: Withdrawals are available on demand. Processing time depends on the network and wallet routing.

q3.q: What pairs does the bot trade?
q3.a: BTC/USDT and ETH/USDT, using multi-layer model ensembles and risk filters.

q4.a: No. Past performance is not indicative of future results. Returns can vary and may be negative.

q5.q: What is the recommended minimum deposit?
q5.a: 100 USDT. This level helps the strategy operate efficiently while fees remain proportional.

q6.a: Real-time portfolio risk calibration, adaptive position sizing, defensive mode during volatility spikes, and multi-layer signal validation.

q7.a: Fees apply on deposit and withdrawal. They are shown transparently before confirmation.
